_comment: Plugin-level hooks manifest for llm-language v4.1. Declares hooks and monitors that auto-arm when the plugin is installed.

hooks.description: Load ROSETTA freshness check + emit Jarvis awareness cards
Capture language/verbosity/domain signals from every user prompt
Consolidate signal buffer into ROSETTA Evolution Log (throttled 10min)
Log completed tasks to ROSETTA Jarvis Patterns for anticipation learning
Snapshot ROSETTA to auto-memory before compaction (write-then-allow)

monitors._comment: Future: background monitor for Jarvis passive observation. Requires Claude Code v2.1.100+ monitors feature.
monitors.name: jarvis-passive-observer
monitors.description: Passive Jarvis observation — learns workflow patterns without explicit invocation

_installation_note: Claude Code auto-discovers this file when the plugin is installed. No manual settings.json entry required. To disable any specific hook, use a matcher restriction in your ~/.claude/settings.json.
